title: Roasted Butternut Squash Curry
description: A flavorful and comforting Indian-inspired curry made with roasted butternut squash, creamy coconut milk, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: oil
ingredients.notes: such as coconut or vegetable oil

instructions: Toss the butternut squash with oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 30-40 minutes, or until tender.
In a large pan, heat oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the curry powder, cumin powder, and turmeric powder. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Stir in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Add the roasted butternut squash to the pan and stir to combine.
Simmer the curry for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
